questions.prompt: If \( \sin(A - B) = \frac{1}{2} \), \( \cos(A + B) = \frac{1}{2} \), find \( A \) and \( B \).
questions.reason:
Since \( \sin 30^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \) and \( \cos 60^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \), we have:
\( A - B = 30^\circ \)
\( A + B = 60^\circ \)
Adding both equations gives \( 2A = 90^\circ \), so \( A = 45^\circ \). Substituting \( A \) back into the first equation: \( 45^\circ - B = 30^\circ \), which means \( B = 15^\circ \).
questions.reason_hi:
चूँकि \( \sin 30^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \) और \( \cos 60^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \) होता है, हमारे पास है:
\( A - B = 30^\circ \)
\( A + B = 60^\circ \)
दोनों समीकरणों को जोड़ने पर \( 2A = 90^\circ \) प्राप्त होता है, अतः \( A = 45^\circ \)। \( A \) का मान पहले समीकरण में रखने पर: \( 45^\circ - B = 30^\circ \), जिसका अर्थ है \( B = 15^\circ \)।

questions.reason:
Since \( \sin 60^\circ = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \) and \( \cos 90^\circ = 0 \), we can write:
\( A + 2B = 60^\circ \)
\( A + 4B = 90^\circ \)
Subtracting the first equation from the second gives \( 2B = 30^\circ \), which means \( B = 15^\circ \). Substituting \( B \) into the first equation gives \( A + 2(15^\circ) = 60^\circ \), so \( A = 30^\circ \).
questions.reason_hi:
चूँकि \( \sin 60^\circ = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \) और \( \cos 90^\circ = 0 \) होता है, हम लिख सकते हैं:
\( A + 2B = 60^\circ \)
\( A + 4B = 90^\circ \)
दूसरे समीकरण में से पहला घटाने पर \( 2B = 30^\circ \) प्राप्त होता है, जिसका अर्थ है \( B = 15^\circ \)। \( B \) का मान पहले समीकरण में रखने पर \( A + 2(15^\circ) = 60^\circ \) प्राप्त होता है, अतः \( A = 30^\circ \)।

questions.prompt: If \( \sin A + \cos B + \sin C = 3 \), then \( \cot\left(\frac{A + B + C}{3}\right) = ? \)
questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \sin A + \cos B + \sin C = 3 \) है, तो \( \cot\left(\frac{A + B + C}{3}\right) = ? \)
questions.reason:
The maximum value for sine and cosine is 1. For their sum to be 3, each must be 1. Therefore, \( \sin A = 1 \) (\( A = 90^\circ \)), \( \cos B = 1 \) (\( B = 0^\circ \)), and \( \sin C = 1 \) (\( C = 90^\circ \)).
Now calculate \( \cot\left(\frac{A + B + C}{3}\right) = \cot\left(\frac{90^\circ + 0^\circ + 90^\circ}{3}\right) = \cot\left(\frac{180^\circ}{3}\right) = \cot(60^\circ) = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \).
questions.reason_hi:
साइन (sine) और कोसाइन (cosine) का अधिकतम मान 1 होता है। इनका योग 3 होने के लिए, प्रत्येक का मान 1 होना चाहिए। अतः, \( \sin A = 1 \) (\( A = 90^\circ \)), \( \cos B = 1 \) (\( B = 0^\circ \)), और \( \sin C = 1 \) (\( C = 90^\circ \))।
अब गणना करें: \( \cot\left(\frac{A + B + C}{3}\right) = \cot\left(\frac{90^\circ + 0^\circ + 90^\circ}{3}\right) = \cot\left(\frac{180^\circ}{3}\right) = \cot(60^\circ) = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \)।

questions.reason:
Given \( 2\sin\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right) = 1 \), so \( \sin\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right) = \frac{1}{2} \).
Since \( \sin 30^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \), we have \( \frac{\theta}{2} = 30^\circ \), which implies \( \theta = 60^\circ \).
Therefore, \( \tan\theta = \tan 60^\circ = \sqrt{3} \).
questions.reason_hi:
दिया गया है \( 2\sin\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right) = 1 \), अतः \( \sin\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right) = \frac{1}{2} \)।
चूँकि \( \sin 30^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \) होता है, इसलिए \( \frac{\theta}{2} = 30^\circ \), जिसका अर्थ है \( \theta = 60^\circ \)।
अतः, \( \tan\theta = \tan 60^\circ = \sqrt{3} \)।

questions.reason:
First, evaluate the RHS: \( \cos 60^\circ + \sin 45^\circ \cos 45^\circ = \frac{1}{2} + \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right) = \frac{1}{2} + \frac{1}{2} = 1 \).
Now equate LHS and RHS: \( \sqrt{3}\tan 2\theta = 1 \implies \tan 2\theta = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \).
Since \( \tan 30^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \), we have \( 2\theta = 30^\circ \), which gives \( \theta = 15^\circ \).
questions.reason_hi:
सबसे पहले, RHS को हल करें: \( \cos 60^\circ + \sin 45^\circ \cos 45^\circ = \frac{1}{2} + \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right) = \frac{1}{2} + \frac{1}{2} = 1 \)।
अब LHS और RHS को बराबर करें: \( \sqrt{3}\tan 2\theta = 1 \implies \tan 2\theta = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \)।
चूँकि \( \tan 30^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \) होता है, इसलिए \( 2\theta = 30^\circ \), जिससे \( \theta = 15^\circ \) प्राप्त होता है।

questions.reason:
Given \( \sin\theta = \cos\theta \), dividing by \( \cos\theta \) gives \( \tan\theta = 1 \), so \( \theta = 45^\circ \).
Substituting \( \theta = 45^\circ \) into the expression: \( 2\tan^2(45^\circ) + \sin^2(45^\circ) - 1 = 2(1)^2 + \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)^2 - 1 = 2 + \frac{1}{2} - 1 = 1 + \frac{1}{2} = \frac{3}{2} \).
questions.reason_hi:
दिया गया है \( \sin\theta = \cos\theta \), \( \cos\theta \) से भाग देने पर \( \tan\theta = 1 \) प्राप्त होता है, अतः \( \theta = 45^\circ \)।
व्यंजक में \( \theta = 45^\circ \) रखने पर: \( 2\tan^2(45^\circ) + \sin^2(45^\circ) - 1 = 2(1)^2 + \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)^2 - 1 = 2 + \frac{1}{2} - 1 = 1 + \frac{1}{2} = \frac{3}{2} \)।

questions.prompt: In \( \Delta ABC \), \( \tan(A + B - C) = 1 \), \( \sec(B + C - A) = 2 \), find \( A, B \) and \( C \).
questions.prompt_hi: \( \Delta ABC \) में, यदि \( \tan(A + B - C) = 1 \), \( \sec(B + C - A) = 2 \) है, तो \( A, B \) और \( C \) ज्ञात करें।
questions.reason:
Since \( A + B + C = 180^\circ \) in a triangle:
From \( \tan(A + B - C) = 1 \), we get \( A + B - C = 45^\circ \). Substitute \( A + B = 180^\circ - C \implies 180^\circ - 2C = 45^\circ \implies 2C = 135^\circ \implies C = 67.5^\circ \).
From \( \sec(B + C - A) = 2 \), we get \( B + C - A = 60^\circ \). Substitute \( B + C = 180^\circ - A \implies 180^\circ - 2A = 60^\circ \implies 2A = 120^\circ \implies A = 60^\circ \).
Now, \( B = 180^\circ - (A + C) = 180^\circ - (60^\circ + 67.5^\circ) = 180^\circ - 127.5^\circ = 52.5^\circ \).
questions.reason_hi:
चूँकि त्रिभुज में \( A + B + C = 180^\circ \) होता है:
\( \tan(A + B - C) = 1 \) से, हमें \( A + B - C = 45^\circ \) प्राप्त होता है। \( A + B = 180^\circ - C \) रखने पर \( \implies 180^\circ - 2C = 45^\circ \implies 2C = 135^\circ \implies C = 67.5^\circ \)।
\( \sec(B + C - A) = 2 \) से, हमें \( B + C - A = 60^\circ \) प्राप्त होता है। \( B + C = 180^\circ - A \) रखने पर \( \implies 180^\circ - 2A = 60^\circ \implies 2A = 120^\circ \implies A = 60^\circ \)।
अब, \( B = 180^\circ - (A + C) = 180^\circ - (60^\circ + 67.5^\circ) = 180^\circ - 127.5^\circ = 52.5^\circ \)।

questions.prompt_hi: यदि \( \sin(\alpha + \beta - \gamma) = \frac{1}{2} \), \( \cos(\beta + \gamma - \alpha) = \frac{1}{2} \), \( \tan(\gamma + \alpha - \beta) = 1 \) है, तो \( \alpha, \beta \) और \( \gamma \) ज्ञात करें।
questions.reason:
From the given values:
(1) \( \alpha + \beta - \gamma = 30^\circ \) (because \( \sin 30^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \))
(2) \( -\alpha + \beta + \gamma = 60^\circ \) (because \( \cos 60^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \))
(3) \( \alpha - \beta + \gamma = 45^\circ \) (because \( \tan 45^\circ = 1 \))
Adding (1) and (2): \( 2\beta = 90^\circ \implies \beta = 45^\circ \).
Adding (2) and (3): \( 2\gamma = 105^\circ \implies \gamma = 52.5^\circ \).
Adding (1) and (3): \( 2\alpha = 75^\circ \implies \alpha = 37.5^\circ \).
questions.reason_hi:
दिए गए मानों से:
(1) \( \alpha + \beta - \gamma = 30^\circ \) (क्योंकि \( \sin 30^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \))
(2) \( -\alpha + \beta + \gamma = 60^\circ \) (क्योंकि \( \cos 60^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \))
(3) \( \alpha - \beta + \gamma = 45^\circ \) (क्योंकि \( \tan 45^\circ = 1 \))
(1) और (2) को जोड़ने पर: \( 2\beta = 90^\circ \implies \beta = 45^\circ \)।
(2) और (3) को जोड़ने पर: \( 2\gamma = 105^\circ \implies \gamma = 52.5^\circ \)।
(1) और (3) को जोड़ने पर: \( 2\alpha = 75^\circ \implies \alpha = 37.5^\circ \)।
